name: Farm
notes: Pre-seeded at every base alongside HQ and Quarry (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md's Base Seeding), but NOT isFixed — unlike HQ/Ice Spire, additional Farms can be freely built after the seeded one is lost/demolished. Ticks automatically every 5s resource tick, no player input (Resource category). HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
